name: Oriental Green Salad (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables in a large bowl. Toss to mix.
2. Set aside.
3. Combine 3 tablespoons low-sodium soy sauce, 3 tablespoons rice vinegar, 2 tablespoons water, 1/4 teaspoon minced fresh garlic, and 1/4 teaspoon minced fresh ginger root in a blender or small jar.
4. Process briefly or shake well to combine ingredients.
5. Pour dressing over salad and toss to coat.
6. Serve at once. Serves 4.
